channel.title: Cobalt 200 on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Cobalt 200 on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In development] Preview: Azure Cobalt 200 Arm-based Dpsv7, Dplsv7, Epsv7, Mpsv4, and Lpsv5-series Virtual Machines
item.description:
Azure has previewed new Arm-based Cobalt 200 VM families: Dpsv7, Dplsv7, Epsv7, Mpsv4, and Lpsv5. They are positioned as improvements over the previous Cobalt 100 generation.

  • Source: Azure Updates
